request.text:
A customer received a defective phone 45 days ago. They want to know whether
they can still return it for a full refund without contacting support, and how
long the refund will take. What should we tell them, and what conditions
apply?

A full self-service refund is no longer possible after 45 days; the documented
30-day window only covers defective devices returned within that period.
After 30 days a support manager must explicitly approve the refund, and the
policy makes clear that approval is not guaranteed even for a defective unit.
The refund timing itself is not stated in the policy excerpts above, so we
cannot promise 48-hour processing — that detail is unsupported by the source
text.
